articles.title: Suspension of M1-Simba merger assessment: What are radio frequency bands and why telcos are assigned them
articles.summary:
📰 취업, 기술 관련 뉴스
📢 Suspension of M1-Simba merger assessment: What are radio frequency bands and why...
articles.content: The four mobile network operators here are M1, Singtel, StarHub Mobile and Simba Telecom. Radio frequencies are a part of the electromagnetic spectrum used for wireless communication and signal transmission. Its usage includes: radio, aircraft navigation, marine radio, television broadcasting, mobile networks and even satellite systems
